spec.name: Spell That Detects
spec.summary: A spell that detects effects using light magic.
spec.effect_description: A spell that detects effects using light magic. A triangle sense/affect recipe that channels light discipline into photonic output. It applies a field pattern against where written across self reach with immediate persistence.
